roundup.title: Qwen3.7-Max Hits Code Arena #4 as Stacks Speed Up
roundup.subtitle: Qwen3.7-Max 登顶 Code Arena，推理与解析全面提速
headline: @Alibaba_Qwen 发布 Qwen3.7-Max 登上 Code Arena 第 4 名，与 Claude Opus 4.6 并列，同时在 GPQA 与 MMLU-Pro 取得高分。@ValsAI 同步公布其在 Agentic 任务上的大幅提升，显示中国实验室在编码与 Agent 能力上的追赶速度。
@perplexity_ai 开源 Unigram tokenizer，将 CPU 利用率降低 5-6 倍；@llama_index 发布 LiteParse v2.0 实现最高 100 倍解析加速。两项开源更新直接降低本地与边缘推理的硬件门槛。
@vllm_project 合并 Rust 前端并推出 EAGLE 3.1，单进程吞吐提升 5 倍，长上下文接受长度翻倍。@NVIDIAAI 同期发布 Dynamo Snapshot，把 Kubernetes 推理冷启动从分钟级压到 5 秒内。
@LangChain 推出 LLM Gateway 治理层，防止 Agent 一夜烧掉上万美元；@AnthropicAI 博客强调 Agent 权限需随能力演进并加强沙箱。Agent 生产化安全与成本控制成为共同焦点。

deepDives.title: Qwen3.7-Max 登顶 Code Arena 并开放隐式缓存
deepDives.summary: Alibaba Qwen 团队发布 Qwen3.7-Max，在编码基准与 Agentic 任务上取得显著进步，同时上线自动隐式缓存以降低成本。

facts.text: Qwen3.7-Max 登上 Code Arena 第 4 名，与 Claude Opus 4.6 并列。
facts.quote: Qwen3.7-Max just hit #4 on Code Arena, on par with Claude Opus 4.6

facts.text: Qwen3.7-Max 在 VCB 与 Finance Agent 任务分别提升 22pp 与 8pp，GPQA 达 90%、MMLU-Pro 达 89%。
facts.quote: Qwen 3.7 Max: agentic gains +22pp VCB, +8pp Finance Agent; GPQA 90%, MMLU-Pro 89%

facts.text: Qwen3.7-Max 推理速度创纪录 580 tps，并自动启用隐式缓存。

bullish.text: 中国实验室首次在 Code Arena 进入前四，性价比优势明显。

recap.title: Inference & Parsing Infra / 推理与解析加速

bullets.text: Perplexity 开源 Unigram tokenizer，CPU 利用率降低 5-6 倍。
LlamaParse v2.0 Rust 重写，解析速度最高提升 100 倍。
vLLM Rust 前端合并，单进程吞吐提升约 5 倍。

recap.title: Agent Tooling & Governance / Agent 工具与治理

bullets.text: LangSmith LLM Gateway 上线，防止 Agent 成本失控。
bullets.quote: Your agents can burn through $10k overnight

bullets.text: Runway MCP 直接接入 Claude、Cursor 等主流 Agent 平台。
bullets.quote: Connect the MCP to your agent in seconds

recap.title: Model Performance & Cost Curves / 模型性能与成本曲线

bullets.text: Poolside Laguna M.1 支持 256K 上下文，Terminal-Bench 2.0 达 45.8%。
NVIDIA Vera CPU 在 Linux 内核编译上实现 2 倍加速。

topTweets.author: @Alibaba_Qwen
topTweets.text: Qwen3.7-Max 登上 Code Arena 第 4 名并支持隐式缓存。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 中国模型首次进入 Code Arena 前四，性价比信号强

topTweets.author: @perplexity_ai
topTweets.text: 开源 Unigram tokenizer，CPU 利用率降低 5-6 倍。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 显著降低本地推理 CPU 开销

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: EAGLE 3.1 与 Rust 前端合并，长上下文与吞吐双提升。

topTweets.author: @NVIDIAAI
topTweets.text: Dynamo Snapshot 把 Kubernetes 推理冷启动压到 5 秒内。
topTweets.whyItMatters: Agentic 工作负载部署效率大幅提升

topTweets.author: @LangChain
topTweets.text: LangSmith LLM Gateway 增加治理层，控制 Agent 成本。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 生产级 Agent 成本控制新工具

takeaways: Qwen3.7-Max 的隐式缓存与高基准成绩显示，下一代模型将默认内置成本优化特性。
vLLM Rust 前端与 NVIDIA Dynamo Snapshot 共同把推理冷启动与吞吐推向新高度，Agent 部署成本持续下降。
开源 tokenizer 与解析器 5-100 倍加速，让本地与边缘推理成为可行选项。
LangSmith Gateway 与 Anthropic 沙箱建议提醒工程师，Agent 治理与权限设计需同步演进。

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: 1 of 8 NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell being torn down for tinybox pro install. Don't worry, it's only $10,000 if you shear one of the ribbon cables.

items.author: @Grad62304977
items.text: Frankly a lot of the OPD convos are happening bcs labs are still doing the expert RL then OPD from experts which is very ugly imo and soon will not be done anymore I mainly view OPD as SFT+ where there’s a point in SFT that u can squeeze more from ur model performance but also its in a good state so OPD can help, also
items.whyItMatters: OPD作为SFT+的RL优化思路，更稳定且成本低

items.author: @emollick
items.text: There is a lot being written about the stylistic tells of AI writing (em-dashes, etc.) but this paper looks at AI narrative tells Fascinating differences between AI & human narrative, and asking AI to write in different styles doesn't do much to change it https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03136
items.whyItMatters: AI 叙事特征论文，助力内容生成评估

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text:
Introducing DiffusionBlocks: Block-wise Neural Network Training via Diffusion Interpretation

http://pub.sakana.ai/diffusionblocks

What if we didn’t have to hold an entire neural network in memory to train it?

Standard neural net training optimizes all parameters jointly. As a result, the memory required during train
items.whyItMatters: 块式训练大幅降低大模型训练内存需求

items.author: @rasbt
items.text:
The MiniMax M2 series was one of the most widely used open-weight LLM series earlier this year. Now, we got a technical report with some interesting tidbits. I summarized some of them below:

1. Full attention as an anti-trend?:

They tried hybrid sliding-window attention variants... but even though there were efficien
items.whyItMatters: M2技术报告：全注意力 vs 高效变体生产权衡

items.author: @kellerjordan0
items.text: Modded-NanoGPT optimization result #18: @zhanpeng_zhou has achieved a step count of 3225 with a preconditioned Muon variant called PMuon. This non-SOTA result is notable because it doesn't use the other SOTA-track techniques like update clamping and contra-muon.
items.whyItMatters: Muon优化器新变体达3225步，训练效率新信号

items.author: @kellerjordan0
items.text: Modded-NanoGPT optimization result #19 (2026/05/08): @wen_kaiyue has achieved 3125 steps using KLSOAP-Hyperball, matching the record.
items.whyItMatters: NanoGPT基准新纪录，优化器迭代值得跟踪

items.author: @wandb
items.text: The scariest bug from a coding agent isn't the one that crashes. It's the one that runs cleanly, passes tests, and quietly produces wrong results. So we built one on @Antigravity's Gemini Managed Agents API to hunt them.
items.whyItMatters: 展示生产级Agent可观测性与bug检测实践，Weave tracing对调试自主workflow至关重要。

items.author: @aiDotEngineer
items.text: Your Coding Agent Should Do AI System Engineering. Your coding agent writes code. But can it do system engineering? @ben_burtenshaw from @huggingface argues that's the real unlock — agents that understand architecture, not just syntax.
items.whyItMatters: 强调Agent从代码生成向系统架构理解演进，对下一代AI coding工具设计有启发。

items.author: @bromann
items.text: As someone who contributed to this: the goal wasn’t “more streaming APIs.” It was one streaming mental model that scales from a bare model call, to an in-process agent, to a deployed LangGraph app behind the SDK.
items.whyItMatters: LangChain/LangGraph 统一 streaming 模型

items.author: @hxiao
items.text: anyone working on LLM/SLM for efficient structured extraction? I wonder what the SOTA is today and how fast one can get. I tried using Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP for this task and got about 0.5 facts/sec with good accuracy. Summarized my configs and experiments below.
items.whyItMatters: Qwen模型结构化抽取实测0.5 facts/sec，分享SOTA实验配置

items.author: @robotsdigest
items.text: Mixing fine-grained instructions with standard goal-level instructions works best. FineVLA reaches 86.8%/82.5% on RoboTwin and significantly improves real-world steerable control... RoboFine-VLM reaches 71.0% VQA accuracy
items.whyItMatters: 机器人VLA模型新benchmark与方法

items.text: going deeper on 'open' vs 'closed' specialists in my Hermes Agent setup... OPEN: you steer, broad tools; CLOSED: soul.md + skills, cron/backlog, verifiable output. When to graduate open to closed: run same workflow 8+ times, verifiable output.

items.author: @HamelHusain
items.text: If you can’t eval a thing easily it’s a product smell What you need from an analytics AI is proof that the number can be trusted. This means verifying quantities used against trusted reports... (coding agents verifiability)
items.whyItMatters: AI 编码代理可验证性，产品设计关键

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: I have been very impressed by @SemiAnalysis_ ... Neat things I learned today: Some of the 800VDC datacenter design choices leverage parts commoditized by electric vehicles...
items.whyItMatters: 数据中心 800VDC 与 SiC MOSFET 硬件洞见

items.author: @LangChain_JS
items.text: New in @LangChain_JS 1.4.3: register streamTransformers on middleware. Your reusable agent extensions can now ship their own v3 streaming channels alongside hooks and tools, merged at compile time with full TypeScript inference.
items.whyItMatters: LangChain JS 1.4.3新增流式中间件，Agent开发更模块化

items.author: @TheAITimeline
items.text: Code as Agent Harness: A survey work from UIUC, Stanford, and Meta. Code is no longer just the output of AI. It is becoming the executable, inspectable, and stateful substrate through which AI agents reason, act, verify, remember, and self-correct over long horizons.
items.whyItMatters: 详细调研代码作为Agent核心基建，对构建可靠长时程Agent系统有直接参考价值。

items.author: @TheAITimeline
items.text: Gated DeltaNet-2 is here. New paper: Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention. Outperforms KDA and Mamba-3 at 1.3B scale. Biggest gains on long-context RULER retrieval.
items.whyItMatters: 新型线性注意力架构，显著提升长上下文性能，值得关注下一代RNN/SSM替代方案。

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Cartesia is excited to be the Voice that powers @avaturn_me's new Open Weights AVTR-1 avatar models. Check out the links, repo and docs below 👇
items.whyItMatters: 开源视频头像模型集成 Cartesia 语音

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: Laguna M.1 and XS.2 now support 256K context. Laguna M.1 is now live with a 256K context window on the Poolside API and OpenRouter. With this update, it reaches 45.8% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, improving long-horizon performance.
items.whyItMatters: 长上下文Agentic coding模型更新，benchmark提升

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: We built the NVIDIA Vera CPU for agentic AI, and the latest benchmarks from @Phoronix confirm it delivers. ⚡1.5x overall performance vs. leading x86 processors ⚡2x faster Linux kernel compilation ⚡4x greater STREAM TRIAD memory bandwidth
items.whyItMatters: Agentic AI专用CPU基准数据，性能显著

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: We built ASPI to isolate clarification-seeking as its own agent state. Across 10 frontier models, clarification-seeking consistently increased vulnerability to prompt injection attacks. o3: 1.8% → 34.0%; Gemini-3-Flash: 2.2% → 35.7%. Full paper: https://labs.scale.com/papers/aspi
items.whyItMatters: 揭示Agent在clarification模式下的安全新风险

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: 🚀 Open-source upgrade unlocked. Tencent Hy-MT2 is now under Apache License 2.0 — maximum freedom for research, commercial use, fine-tuning. Two variants #1 and #4 on HF trending. Models: https://t.co/VuknSHJATH
items.whyItMatters: Hy-MT2 Apache 2.0开源，HF趋势榜前四

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Congrats to @Alibaba_Qwen on the release! Qwen 3.7 Max: agentic gains +22pp VCB, +8pp Finance Agent; GPQA 90%, MMLU-Pro 89%. SWE-bench competitive. Full results: https://www.vals.ai/models/alibaba_qwen3.7-max
items.whyItMatters: Qwen 3.7 Max agentic benchmark大幅提升

items.author: @Alibaba_Qwen
items.text: ✅Implicit caching is now live on Qwen3.7-Max — kicks in automatically, no setup needed. ⚡️Faster + cheaper

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text:
During Google I/O, we published our research on ERA (Empirical Research Assistance) in Nature.

@ymatias (VP, Google & GM, Google Research) and Lizzie Dorfman (Principal Product Manager for Science AI) discussed how this agentic coding system is unlocking scientific breakthroughs that were previously thought impossible
items.whyItMatters: ERA agentic coding系统助力科学突破

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text: Most models are only evaluated on a fraction of the benchmarks out there. ArtifactLinker, our new system, predicts which ones would set a new state-of-the-art on benchmarks hosted on @HuggingFace, then runs the evaluation to verify.
items.whyItMatters: 自动化发现 SOTA 模型与基准，释放未被充分评估的潜力
